title: POST /books endpoint
evidence: BookController.java implements POST /books; BookControllerTest.java:37-52 tests creation

title: GET /books with optional author filter
evidence: BookController.java implements GET /books with author query param; BookControllerTest.java:65-74 tests filtering

title: GET /books/{id} endpoint
evidence: BookController.java implements GET /books/{id}; BookControllerTest.java:90-91 tests retrieval

title: PUT /books/{id} update endpoint
evidence: BookController.java implements PUT /books/{id}; BookControllerTest.java:77-85 tests update

title: DELETE /books/{id} endpoint
evidence: BookController.java implements DELETE /books/{id}; BookControllerTest.java:87-88 tests deletion

title: SQLite database storage
evidence: pom.xml includes sqlite-jdbc and hibernate-community-dialects; BookRepository extends JpaRepository

title: JSON responses with appropriate HTTP status codes
evidence: BookController.java uses ResponseEntity and HttpStatus for all endpoints; tests verify status codes (200, 201, 400, 404, 204)

title: Input validation (title and author required)
evidence: Book.java uses @NotBlank annotations; ValidationExceptionHandler.java handles validation errors; BookControllerTest.java:55-63 tests validation

title: GET /health endpoint
evidence: BookController.java implements GET /health; BookControllerTest.java:31-35 verifies endpoint

title: README.md with setup and run instructions
At least 3 unit/integration tests
evidence: BookControllerTest.java contains 5 tests: health, create+list, validation, filter, update+delete
